data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintenance.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services with specific functions, connected via APIs.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Instagram uses GraphQL for efficient data retrieval and minimizing redundant data transfer.
data.technical_spec: Single endpoint with tailored queries to fetch exact required data.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures even distribution of incoming traffic across servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses algorithms such as round-robin or least connections.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: CDN is used to distribute content around the globe to improve loading times.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers deployed in multiple regions.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Replicates data across multiple data centers to ensure availability and reliability.
